title: palette update
last_update: The greyed-out update button's label ("Not checked yet", "Up to date", ...) was dark grey on a dark background and unreadable on a monitor. It now uses the theme's light-grey dim text, which is easy to read. A test measures the actual on-screen colours and fails if the label ever becomes hard to read again (verified: it does fail with the old colours). All tests pass and the whole-branch review found no problems. Ready for the owner to review and deploy.

log.m: Contrast fix implemented and green; whole-branch review clean (3 lenses, no findings).
Re-verified after restart: suite green, contrast test proven to discriminate by mutation check, whole-branch review clean (cross-task / fresh-node / lifecycle). Branch left for owner.
